title: MC: The Glowing Ores
description: Texture Pack that makes ores from Minecraft and mods glow in dark
body:
# Create: Glowing Ores
This texture pack makes ores from Minecraft and other mods glow when using shaders.
Using LabPBR 1.3

__**Don't forget to enable LabPBR support in your shader pack!!!**__

**I recommend to place this pack on top of the list**

## Also supported mods:
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

_More mods will be added later_

## Tested shaders:
- Complimentary Reimagined
- BSL
- Complimentary Unbound

Any other shaders that supports LabPBR 1.3 will work with this resource pack.
